disambiguated.context: Two frat boys were stopped by the cops for creating a ruckus during one particularly loud house party, one Muslim and one Hindu. The Muslim guy was there making sure people people at the party were safe, and his friend, the Hindu guy, came to try and pick up any drunk girls he could find.
disambiguated.question: Who was likely just caught in the wrong place at the wrong time?
